Transfers & Actions

Tip: Indirectly allocated costs (rent, admin salaries) use formula: Branch Revenue ÷ Company Revenue × Indirect Expense.

Add New Branch

New branch will be created with status Active. Assign vehicles and drivers after creation.

Transfer Vehicle

Mumbai HQ
Compliance documents (insurance, RC, permits) will be carried over. Verify state-level documents.

Transfer Driver

Pune
Future trips, advances, and settlements will accrue to the destination branch after transfer.
